zh.lifeSummary: 當William Webb I於1425年3月16日出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，他的父親John Alexander Webb I19歲，母親Johanna Hall20歲。他於1445年6月9日與Joan Hopkins結婚。他於1800年被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1523年7月13日在英國維爾爾享年98歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特貝爾頓聖 多馬 A 貝可也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Webb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

variants.name: Webster
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webber
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Webb I was born on 16 March 1425, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, his father, John Alexander Webb I, was 19 and his mother, Johanna Hall, was 20. He married Joan Hopkins on 9 June 1445. In 1800, his occupation is listed as lord mayor of london. He died on 13 July 1523, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 98, and was buried in St Thomas A Becket's Church, Belluton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Webb I est né le 16 mars 1425, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Alexander Webb I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Johanna Hall, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hopkins le 9 juin 1445. En 1800, sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1523, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à St Thomas A Becket's Church, Belluton, Somerset, Angleterre.

Juni 1445 Joan Hopkins geheiratet. 1800 ist sein Beruf als lord mayor of london aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Juli 1523 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Wiltshire, England und wurde in St Thomas A Becket's Church, Belluton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Webb I è nato il il 16 marzo 1425 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John Alexander Webb I, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Hall, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hopkins il 9 giugno 1445. Nel 1800, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london. Morì il 13 luglio 1523, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolto a St Thomas A Becket's Church, Belluton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Webb Iが1425年3月16日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父John Alexander Webb Iは19歳，母Johanna Hallは20歳であった。1445年6月9日にJoan Hopkinsと結婚した。1800年，職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1523年7月13日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで98歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトベルトンスト ソマス ア ベクエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Webb I(이)가 1425년 3월 16일 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Alexander Webb I(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Hall(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1445년 6월 9일 Joan Hopkins(와)과 결혼했다. 1800년, 그의 직업은 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1523년 7월 13일 영국 윌츠히르에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 벨루턴 스트 톰아스 아 벡트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Webb I nasceu em 16 de março de 1425, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Alexander Webb I, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Hall, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hopkins em 9 de junho de 1445. Em 1800, sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1523, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em St Thomas A Becket's Church, Belluton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Webb I родился 16 марта 1425 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Alexander Webb I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Hall, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hopkins 9 июня 1445 г. В 1800 году он работал по профессии lord mayor of london. Он умер 13 июля 1523 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности ст томас а беккет'с чурч, беллутон, сомирсет, Англия.
